Package me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags

Class IntegerTag

java.lang.Object
me.itzloghotxd.nbt.AbstractTag<Integer>
me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags.IntegerTag
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Tag<Integer>
public class IntegerTag extends AbstractTag<Integer>
Represents an NBT tag holding a single int value.

This tag corresponds to TagType.INT and is used to store 32-bit signed integers.

Since:
1.0.1
Author:
ItzLoghotXD
See Also:

      public IntegerTag(@NotNull @NotNull String name, @NotNull @NotNull Integer value)

      name - The name of the tag, must not be null
      value - The value, must not be null
